commands.review_summary:
This PR caps visible short-term memory promotion snippets, threads `dreaming.phases.deep.maxPromotedSnippetTokens` through memory config/status/docs/UI, and adds regression tests for capped promotions and marker keys containing spaces.

PR surface: Source +89, Tests +138, Docs +4. Total +231 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main writes the full promoted `candidate.snippet`, while this branch caps the visible line before appending it to `MEMORY.md`. I did not run a live repro because this review is read-only, but the PR body includes disposable-workspace after-fix output.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed for the new config/default and durable-memory output policy; there is no narrow automated repair to queue until maintainers choose the desired default behavior.
